parsed_output.justification: DeAndre explicitly claimed to be a Werewolf early in the discussion, although he later contradicted this by claiming to be the Troublemaker who swapped Katie and Ryan. This pattern of inconsistent claims—first admitting to being a Werewolf and then attempting to shift suspicion onto Katie—is characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to deceive the group or a Tanner. Given the available information and the alignment of other players (Brett and Ryan) to vote for him, DeAndre is the most likely candidate for the Werewolf role.
